headline: QScreen AI Appoints Former Union Pacific Vice President as Strategic Advisor to Drive Expansion into North American Rail and Transportation Markets
summary: Veteran rail executive with 25 years of senior commercial relationships across North America's Class I railroads joins a platform that enables real-time identification of probable drug use from a camera without requiring blood, breath, or urine testing.Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - April 29, 2026) - QScreen AI Inc. (CSE: QAI) (OTC Pink: PMEDF) (FSE: 3QP), an innovator fusing Quantum-AI technologies to transform health screening, today announces the appointment of José Humberto "Beto"...

headline: Why The Market Is Wrong About UPS Stock
summary: The most significant insight buried within the Q1 2026 earnings noise for United Parcel Service (UPS) is not the moderate revenue beat, but the clear evidence that the 'revenue quality' strategy is gaining traction. While headline domestic revenue contracted by 2.3 percent, revenue-per-piece rose by 6.5 percent. This divergence confirms that UPS is successfully extracting itself from low-margin contracts to prioritize high-yield shipments.
